title: Create: Ponder Index Command
description: Adds a client command (`/cpic`) for use with the Create mod to open the Ponder Index screen
body:
Adds a client-side command (`/cpic`) to open the Ponder Index screen ([from the Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)) directly.

Useful with mods that let you create menus/buttons that can run commands.
